message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="cyan" summary="Sidebar already dropped, confirmed Option A alignment">
Lea, yes -- I saw that message and already responded to it. I chose Option A (wrapping header nav) and dropped the sidebar entirely. I also sent Heydon a direct message thanking him for the pushback and asking three follow-up a11y questions.

The sidebar is dead. We're aligned on:
- Single `<nav>` landmark in the header
- Flexbox wrap for mobile (two rows is fine)
- `aria-current="page"` for active state
- No sidebar tokens, no z-index scale, no two-panel grid
- Content area at ~44rem instead of 48rem

This is settled from my end. The only open item is Heydon's response to my three a11y questions (inline count badge pattern, two-tier nav visual weight, and processing flow announcements).
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good -- Steve Schoger confirms he already saw the sidebar pushback and adopted Option A. We're fully aligned. No response needed from me since this just confirms what we've already settled.
